dimensions.rationale: Specification revision 3 does not define the operation-output projection, immutable release assembly order or post-review controller finalization.
Neutrality lacks a canonical self-output projection and completion lacks a distinct controller-owned final-proof phase.
The DAG remains acyclic with zero overlaps, and the WS-01 subpackage entrypoint is owned by WS-01.
Versioned contracts and offline adapter compatibility remain explicit and unchanged.
A receipt written inside its scanned repository changes the subject unless exact projection and path-safety rules are frozen.
Product budgets, benchmark cohorts and live-calibration ceilings remain measurable.
Release neutrality is not bound to a prior immutable payload inventory, and EV-FINAL cannot include the later WS-15 gate and review.
WS-14 lacks an assemble-scan-verify sequence and the controller lacks a frozen post-review final-proof transition.
Self-mutating scan outputs, release ordering and the WS-15 post-gate cycle prevent fail-closed execution.
Eight effective waves, width four, zero overlaps and bounded task context are preserved; WS-14 needs ordered commands, not another workstream.

findings.message: Bootstrap, controller and release neutrality write their own artifact or receipt inside the scanned repository, but the frozen authority defines no canonical operation-output projection; producer and verifier can therefore bind different subjects.
findings.requiredAction: Publish specification revision 4 and neutrality-authority-profile.v2 with an exact repository-relative operationOutputs set, fail-closed path validation, exact-output-only exclusion without a skip, complete subject component digests and identical race-checked producer/verifier recomputation; update commands, tests and evidence contracts before plan revision 5 review.

findings.message: VAL-NEUTRALITY-RELEASE runs before any frozen command assembles and content-addresses the exact release payload inventory, while VAL-RELEASE later consumes that neutrality receipt and claims two reproducible builds.
findings.requiredAction: Keep WS-14 sequential; add VAL-RELEASE-ASSEMBLY and WS-14-owned EV-RELEASE-ASSEMBLY, then run immutable two-build assembly, neutrality bound to its inventory and payload root, and non-mutating release verification with --no-build. Add the new evidence to REQ-RELEASE and AC-RELEASE.

findings.message: VAL-FINAL runs before the WS-15 post-attempt neutrality receipt and independent task review exist, so EV-FINAL cannot reconcile every gate and accepted task while authorizing COMPLETE.
findings.requiredAction: Make EV-FINAL a READY_FOR_FINALIZATION audit, then run a controller-owned final-proof operation after WS-15 result, verified post-attempt gate and ACCEPTED review; atomically bind its proof digest when transitioning AWAITING_FINAL_PROOF to COMPLETE.

findings.message: Revision 4 uses python -m agent_lifecycle.neutrality bootstrap, whose subpackage entrypoint is inside WS-01 ownership; the root package entrypoint remains owned by WS-07.
findings.requiredAction: Preserve the subpackage command and test that it is runnable before WS-02 launches.

findings.message: The append-only specification and plan-review ancestry preserves the available prior subjects and exact content identities.
findings.requiredAction: Preserve the existing specification and plan-review chain unchanged.

findings.message: Bootstrap, runtime and release neutrality scopes, external trust inputs, signed receipts and zero-result counters are present.
findings.requiredAction: Preserve the neutrality scopes, receipt bindings and redaction boundary while resolving the new projection finding.

findings.message: Task and final acceptance reject every unresolved Medium, High or Blocker finding.
Required adapters run offline from frozen contracts and cannot claim maturity above EXPERIMENTAL without separate live proof.
findings.requiredAction: Keep live capability outside the required DAG and preserve evidence-accurate maturity.

findings.message: The product profile freezes S0/S1/S2 ceilings, benchmark cohorts, regression limits and bounded live calibration.
findings.requiredAction: Preserve the product budget and benchmark authorities.

findings.message: Nine CI-owned platform legs, external authority and fail-closed aggregate evidence are frozen.
findings.requiredAction: Preserve all leg identities, receipts and aggregate consumption.

findings.message: Workstreams remain the sole canonical dependency DAG; worker-level dependsOn fields are absent.

summary: CHANGES_REQUIRED for REOPENED plan revision 4 bound to dc84370c1983c8d6f4c275ceaa37865d404703ed43d49d0f94e9ace82ed48f71 and previous review 307c9f88b7647e72172a6a0d5d9a5efc79ffe447e67d3d12353675cccf668b91. PLAN-001 through PLAN-007 and PLAN-WS01-ENTRYPOINT are resolved. PLAN-NEUTRALITY-SUBJECT-FIXPOINT, PLAN-RELEASE-PAYLOAD-ORDER and PLAN-FINAL-POST-GATE-CYCLE remain open; specification revision 4 and plan revision 5 corrections require another independent full review.
